steps.prompt: See the top switch? Give it a tap!
steps.feedback: Top switch is on — but look, the lamp is still dark! This gate is picky. It needs both switches.

steps.prompt: Now turn the top switch off again.
steps.feedback: Off! Now let's try the bottom switch.
Bottom switch is on... but the lamp is still out! It needs both!
Both switches on — the lamp lights up! This gate needs both. It's called an AND gate!
